title: prenia pallens
intro: Prenia pallens, also known as the pale prenia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of prenia pallens include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
